name: DeadlockBuilds
author: Viscous Wiki
description: Adds a <deadlockbuild id="..."/> parser tag that renders a Deadlock build (item build order, hero, tags) fetched live from the deadlock-api.com community API and cached.

DeadlockBuildsApiBase.description: Base URL of the deadlock-api.com API.

DeadlockBuildsBuildTtl.description: Seconds to cache a single build's data.

DeadlockBuildsAssetTtl.description: Seconds to cache the items/heroes/tags asset maps.
